title: TLSInspectionConfigurationResponse
description: The high-level properties of a TLS inspection configuration. This, along with the TLSInspectionConfiguration, define the TLS inspection configuration. You can retrieve all objects for a TLS inspection configuration by calling DescribeTLSInspectionConfiguration.

allOf.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the TLS inspection configuration.
The descriptive name of the TLS inspection configuration. You can't change the name of a TLS inspection configuration after you create it.
A unique identifier for the TLS inspection configuration. This ID is returned in the responses to create and list commands. You provide it to operations such as update and delete.

Detailed information about the current status of a TLSInspectionConfiguration. You can retrieve this for a TLS inspection configuration by calling DescribeTLSInspectionConfiguration and providing the TLS inspection configuration name and ARN.
A description of the TLS inspection configuration.
The key:value pairs to associate with the resource.
The last time that the TLS inspection configuration was changed.
The number of firewall policies that use this TLS inspection configuration.
A complex type that contains the Amazon Web Services KMS encryption configuration settings for your TLS inspection configuration.
A list of the certificates associated with the TLS inspection configuration.
